qualification.education_qualification: BTech or MBA or other related fields with 3+ years of experience. Minimum of 1 year experience in incubation, startup ecosystem, startup investment processes.
qualification.details: Program Manager- Incubation (Consultant Role): BTech or MBA or other related fields with 3+ years of experience. Minimum of 1 year experience in incubation, startup ecosystem, startup investment processes.

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Multiple rounds of interviews
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIML EIC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIML EIC Program Manager- Incubation (Consultant Role) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIML EIC Program Manager- Incubation (Consultant Role) recruitment is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Program Manager- Incubation (Consultant Role) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Program Manager- Incubation (Consultant Role) position at IIML EIC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a BTech or Masters degree in Business/Technology/or other related fields to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum experience required?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3 years of overall experience is required, with at least 1 year specifically in incubation, startup ecosystem, or startup investment processes.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Program Manager- Incubation (Consultant Role)?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 600,000 to Rs. 900,000 per annum.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the IIM Lucknow Enterprise Incubation Centre located?
faq.answer: The IIM Lucknow Enterprise Incubation Centre is located in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 201307.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by multiple rounds of interviews.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any specific knowledge preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Knowledge of Industry 4.0 and AI solutions companies is preferred for candidates applying for this position.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIML EIC Program Manager- Incubation (Consultant Role) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIML EIC Program Manager- Incubation (Consultant Role) recruitment is 30th June 2026.
